transcript:
CALLER: Hi! I want to book a vaccination slot — for meningitis. I'm going abroad for studies soon.
AGENT: Congratulations on going abroad! Yes, we do administer travel vaccines including meningitis. Your name and travel date?
CALLER: Nishant Goswami. I leave in 6 weeks. 9765001234.
AGENT: Good timing — 6 weeks is fine for this vaccine. We have a travel vaccination slot this Friday morning at 10 AM. Shall I book it?
CALLER: Yes please! Do I need to bring anything?
AGENT: Just your passport copy and your university acceptance letter if available. Booked for Nishant Goswami, Friday 10 AM. Have a great time abroad!
CALLER: Thank you so much!
